female.subtitle: Your store is ready and waiting for you! Now you can easily customize it.
female.step1Desc: From the 'Theme' tab in the sidebar, choose the style that fits your store
female.step2Desc: From the 'Sections' tab, add, remove, or change the order of sections
female.step3Desc: After you finish editing, click 💾 Save then 'Publish' to make your store live
female.assistantHint: If you need help at any time, click on the 'Assistant' tab ✨

layout.footerSubtitle: The Egyptian E-commerce Platform for Fashion and Beauty

home.subtitle: 100% Egyptian platform empowering merchants to create professional fashion & beauty stores — Nour is a SaaS platform with Paymob & WhatsApp ready from day one.
home.noCreditCard: No credit card required • Cancel anytime

features.title: Everything you need to sell online
features.subtitle: A complete platform designed specifically for the Egyptian market — no compromise on details.

easy.title: Smart Store Editor
easy.desc: The interface is easier than you think. Change colors, fonts, and images like playing a game.

payments.title: Paymob Payments
payments.desc: Accept payments via cards, e-wallets (Vodafone Cash), and installments like Sympl and Valu. All integrated.

shipping.title: Bosta Shipping
shipping.desc: Create Bosta shipments right from your dashboard, track orders, and manage COD with one click.

whatsapp.title: Automated WhatsApp
whatsapp.desc: Automatically send order confirmations to your customers on WhatsApp — name, order details, and tracking number.

analytics.title: Sales Analytics
analytics.desc: An Arabic dashboard gives you a full view: revenue, best-selling products, and new customers.

team.title: Team Management
team.desc: Add managers and staff to your store with different permissions — owner, manager, employee. Full control over who accesses what.

step1.title: Register your account
step1.desc: Create your account for free in seconds — no credit card required.

step2.title: Customize your store
step2.desc: Add your products, images, categories, and draw your store's identity.

step3.title: Start Selling
step3.desc: Share your store link and start receiving orders immediately.

pricing.title: Transparent pricing to grow your store
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees — no commission on your sales.

t1.name: Sarah Mohamed
t1.text: I opened my store in less than an hour and received my first order on the same day! Nour changed my career.

t2.name: Mai Ahmed
t2.text: Payment via Paymob and Bosta shipping with one click — saved me hours every day.

t3.name: Nadine Hossam
t3.text: Automated WhatsApp messages to customers raised their satisfaction 100%. Exceptional product.

cta.title: Ready to open your store?
cta.subtitle: Join more than 500 Egyptian merchants building their business future with Nour.

register.subtitle: Join thousands of merchants on Nour

register.genderHint: So we can talk to you in the appropriate language

dashboard.title: Store Overview
dashboard.subtitle: Here is where it all begins — track your performance and store growth

orders.title: Recent Orders
orders.desc: Latest orders received from your customers
orders.startSelling: Share your store to receive your first order!

onboarding.title: Your store's story starts here
onboarding.desc: This is your journey to build the perfect store step by step.

story1.story: The customer enters your store and looks for a sign of trust: a clear name, reassuring description, and a look that resembles your brand.

story2.chapter: Chapter 2: A storefront that tells a story
story2.story: Before browsing products, the customer needs a sentence and a picture telling her: this store is designed for you.

story3.story: The store doesn't really start until the customer sees a product with a clear image, price, and stock.

story4.story: After liking the product, the customer asks: when will it arrive and for how much? Have the answer ready.

story5.story: In the last step, the customer needs a clear and reassuring payment method, especially with cash on delivery.

story6.story: Open the store like a new customer: the storefront, product, shipping, and payment should feel like one journey.
